---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, detection rule, integration, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

What frustration, gap, or limitation are you trying to address? Be specific — describe the scenario where this is painful today.

---

## Proposed solution

What should Velonus do? Describe the behaviour you want, including any CLI flags, output format changes, or new integrations.

---

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you decide against them?

---

## Would you be willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd need guidance to implement it
- [ ] No, I'm just filing the idea

---

## Additional context

Relevant links, similar tools, example outputs, or anything else that helps clarify the request.
